title: GR Badgers women coaching staff meet with CSA
description: CRICKET NEWS - The coaching staff of the...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The coaching staff of the Garden Route Badgers professional women's team had a very productive meeting with the relevant Cricket South Africa (CSA) coaching staff in Pretoria on Tuesday 12 August.


> The purpose of the meeting was for CSA to provide a continued professional support development programme and provide updates on the development of any matters that are related to domestic professional cricket in preparation for the upcoming season.


The Garden Route Badgers women - one of six professional women outfits in the country - will participate in its third season in the CSA Hollywoodbets Pro series.

CSA recently released the fixtures for the CSA Hollywoodbets Pro Series.

Pro 50 Series

• 11 October 2025 vs Western Province (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 25 October 2025 vs Dolphins (Hollywoodbets Kingsmead, Durban)

• 01 November 2025 vs DP World Lions (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 15 November 2025 vs North West Dragons (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 22 November 2025 vs Titans Ladies (SuperSport Park, Centurion)

• 07 February 2026 vs Western Province (Six Gun Grill Newlands, Cape Town)

• 14 February 2026 vs DP World Lions (DP World Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg)

• 21 February 2026 vs North West Dragons (JB Marks Oval, Potchefstroom)

• 28 February 2026 vs Dolphins (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 07 March 2026 vs Titans Ladies (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 15/16 March 2026 - PRO 50 FINAL

Pro 20 Series

• 12 October 2025 vs Western Province (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 26 October 2025 vs Dolphins (Hollywoodbets Kingsmead, Durban)

• 02 November 2025 vs DP World Lions (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 16 November 2025 vs North West Dragons (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 23 November 2025 vs Titans Ladies (SuperSport Park, Centurion)

• 08 February 2026 vs Western Province (Six Gun Grill Newlands, Cape Town)

• 15 February 2026 vs DP World Lions (DP World Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg)

• 22 February 2026 vs North West Dragons (JB Marks Oval, Potchefstroom)

• 01 March 2026 vs Dolphins (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 08 March 2026 vs Titans Ladies (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)

• 13/14 March 2026 - PRO 20 FINAL

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
